response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:59.500: Identified as intro talk by Otose Oto. 2. 01:59.501-04:58.000: Song '火炎' detected. On-screen text '作詞・作曲: 吾彼図アヴ' identified the original composer. Search was conducted for lyrics. Full lyrics for '火炎' were successfully retrieved and formatted. 3. Guest performer Mori Calliope joined in the second scene.
response.global_summary: A concert video featuring VTuber Otose Oto, who performs a song titled '火炎' (Kaen), joined by guest performer Mori Calliope. The performance includes dance and vocal elements.

scenes.description: Otose Oto interacts with the audience and introduces the upcoming song. No vocal music is playing.
The song '火炎' begins, featuring Otose Oto as the lead vocalist, with Mori Calliope joining as a guest performer. They perform a choreographed dance and sing.
